allow: Bash(python -m jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=600 --ExecutePreprocessor.kernel_name=mlenv Prototype7.ipynb --output Prototype7.ipynb)
Bash(python -m jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=600 Prototype7.ipynb --output Prototype7.ipynb)

PowerShell(cd E:\\Autofill-Graph\\Baseline; $Json = Get-Content -Path Prototype7.ipynb -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $Cell = $Json.cells | Where-Object { $_.id -eq 'cell-figures-v7' }; $Source = $Cell.source -join ""; $Lines = $Source -split "`n"; $InPlot = $false; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $Lines.Count; $i++\) { if \($Lines[$i] -match "barh|bar\\\(|plot\\\("\) { Write-Output "Line $i : $\($Lines[$i].Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(100, $Lines[$i].Length\)\)\)" } })
